notes:
Added a new menu entry called Report. That moved the report options inside the Analyze to the new Report menu.
 - Now you can export the report also in .md format(markdown)
 - Clicking on any Export Report automatically opens the exported report file too.
 Added new options under the Analyze Menu:
 - Include Inactive Plugins → If true, the app will also look for file references on the plugins that are inactive(They are on the plugin manager, but their status are set to false)
 - Scan Uninstalled Plugins → If true, the app will also search for plugin files that are inside the js folder, but are not being used by the plugin manager.
 Improved the report text to be less repetitive and more compact
 Improved the file reference search to be more precise.
 Fixed some translations that are not properly being shown according to the language chosen.
 Fixed some alignment issues with the Unused and Used Summary.
